languages.text: {n}Устройство вокс-станции искусно встроено в стену: тонкие кабели и крошечные рычажки точно повторяют цвет камня. Найти его можно, лишь наверняка зная, где искать.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Устройство вокс-станции искусно встроено в стену: тонкие кабели и крошечные рычажки точно повторяют цвет камня. Найти его можно, лишь наверняка зная, где искать.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The vox-station apparatus has been expertly built into the wall, with slim cables and miniature levers that perfectly match the colour of the stone. You can only find it if you know exactly where to look.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Устройство вокс-станции искусно встроено в стену: тонкие кабели и крошечные рычажки точно повторяют цвет камня. Найти его можно, лишь наверняка зная, где искать.{/n}

{n}The vox-station apparatus has been expertly built into the wall, with slim cables and miniature levers that perfectly match the colour of the stone. You can only find it if you know exactly where to look.{/n}

languages.text: {n}音阵通讯站被巧妙地嵌入墙体。纤细的线缆和微型拨杆，与石壁的颜色浑然一体。唯有知道其确切位置，才有可能找到它。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-station apparatus has been expertly built into the wall, with slim cables and miniature levers that perfectly match the colour of the stone. You can only find it if you know exactly where to look.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}音阵通讯站被巧妙地嵌入墙体。纤细的线缆和微型拨杆，与石壁的颜色浑然一体。唯有知道其确切位置，才有可能找到它。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le poste-vox encastré dans le mur a été construit d'une main de maître, avec des câbles fins et des leviers miniatures qui imitent parfaitement la couleur que la pierre. Il serait impossible de le trouver sans savoir où chercher.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-station apparatus has been expertly built into the wall, with slim cables and miniature levers that perfectly match the colour of the stone. You can only find it if you know exactly where to look.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le poste-vox encastré dans le mur a été construit d'une main de maître, avec des câbles fins et des leviers miniatures qui imitent parfaitement la couleur que la pierre. Il serait impossible de le trouver sans savoir où chercher.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Voks istasyonu aparatı, ustalıkla duvara monte edilmiş. İnce kabloları ve minyatür kolları, taşın rengiyle mükemmel bir şekilde eşleşiyor. Sadece tam olarak nereye bakacağını bilenler bulabilir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-station apparatus has been expertly built into the wall, with slim cables and miniature levers that perfectly match the colour of the stone. You can only find it if you know exactly where to look.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Voks istasyonu aparatı, ustalıkla duvara monte edilmiş. İnce kabloları ve minyatür kolları, taşın rengiyle mükemmel bir şekilde eşleşiyor. Sadece tam olarak nereye bakacağını bilenler bulabilir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El cuerpo de la estación de voco se ha camuflado hábilmente en el muro, con cables delgados y palanquitas en miniatura que imitan a la perfección el color de la roca. Solo es posible encontrarlo para quien sabe dónde buscarlo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-station apparatus has been expertly built into the wall, with slim cables and miniature levers that perfectly match the colour of the stone. You can only find it if you know exactly where to look.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El cuerpo de la estación de voco se ha camuflado hábilmente en el muro, con cables delgados y palanquitas en miniatura que imitan a la perfección el color de la roca. Solo es posible encontrarlo para quien sabe dónde buscarlo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Vox-Station wurde geschickt in die Mauer eingepasst und mit dünnen Kabeln und winzigen Hebeln versehen, die sich perfekt an die Farbe des Steins anpassen. Man findet sie nur, wenn man genau weiß, wo man suchen muss.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-station apparatus has been expertly built into the wall, with slim cables and miniature levers that perfectly match the colour of the stone. You can only find it if you know exactly where to look.{/n}

languages.text: {n}石の色に合わせた細長いケーブルとミニチュアレバーで、ヴォックス・ステーションの装置が壁に巧みに組み込まれている。場所を知っていなければ見つけることはできない。{/n}
